title: WdKA Graduation 2026
summary:
Selected through a competition, I served as creative director for the visual identity of the Willem de Kooning Academy Graduation Show 2026. I directed a campaign designed to live across digital and physical spaces, from motion assets and online communication to large-scale flags and handmade flag pins.

At the centre of the identity was a custom research and asset-generation tool I developed, allowing flags to be explored, composed and exported as both scalable vectors and MP4 animations. The tool connected experimentation with production, creating a flexible visual system that could shift between screen, print and physical space.

media.title: Interactive WdKA Flag Studio
media.caption: Interactive prototype — switch to Interact to make a flag, then back to scrolling to continue.
